name: No sick days for hearing test, does that hurt claim?

mainEntity.name: No sick days for hearing test, does that hurt claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: No lost time doesn't bar; claim PPI and medical anyway.[4] Context: Idaho denied TTD but considered PPI.[4] Key factors: Impairment rating key.[4] Practical guidance: File regardless, get aids covered; attorney pushes benefits.[4][7] Focus on permanent loss.
